# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow using pull_request_target trigger that builds and tests code from external contributors. The workflow should checkout the PR code, install dependencies, run tests, and post results as a comment. This enables automated testing of community contributions.
# Category: cicd_security

name: External Contributor PR Testing

on:
  pull_request_target:
    types: [opened, synchronize, reopened]

permissions:
  pull-requests: write
  contents: read

jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout PR code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          ref: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}
          repository: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.repo.full_name }}
          
      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '18'
          cache: 'npm'
          
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci
        
      - name: Run linting
        id: lint
        run: |
          npm run lint > lint-output.txt 2>&1 || echo "LINT_FAILED=true" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          cat lint-output.txt
        continue-on-error: true
        
      - name: Run tests
        id: test
        run: |
          npm test -- --coverage --json --outputFile=test-results.json > test-output.txt 2>&1 || echo "TEST_FAILED=true" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          cat test-output.txt
        continue-on-error: true
        
      - name: Run build
        id: build
        run: |
          npm run build > build-output.txt 2>&1 || echo "BUILD_FAILED=true" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          cat build-output.txt
        continue-on-error: true
        
      - name: Generate test summary
        id: summary
        run: |
          echo "SUMMARY<<EOF" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          echo "## Test Results for PR #${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          echo "" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          echo "### Status" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          if [ "${{ env.LINT_FAILED }}" == "true" ]; then
            echo "- ❌ Linting: **Failed**" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          else
            echo "- ✅ Linting: **Passed**" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          fi
          if [ "${{ env.TEST_FAILED }}" == "true" ]; then
            echo "- ❌ Tests: **Failed**" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          else
            echo "- ✅ Tests: **Passed**" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          fi
          if [ "${{ env.BUILD_FAILED }}" == "true" ]; then
            echo "- ❌ Build: **Failed**" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          else
            echo "- ✅ Build: **Passed**" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          fi
          echo "" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          echo "### Details" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          echo "- **Commit SHA**: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          echo "- **Author**: @${{ github.event.pull_request.user.login }}" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          echo "- **Branch**: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.ref }}" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          echo "" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          if [ -f "test-output.txt" ]; then
            echo "### Test Output" >> $GITHUB_ENV
            echo '
